<!-- Title should start with: feat|fix|docs|chore|refactor|test -->

## Summary
A short description of the changes in this PR and the problem it solves.

## Related issue
Closes: # (issue number) or Fixes: #

## What I changed
- Brief bullet list of changes

## Checklist
- [ ] I have read the contribution guidelines in [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My code follows the project style and lint rules
- [ ] I added tests where applicable and they pass
- [ ] I updated any relevant documentation
- [ ] No secrets or sensitive data are included

## Screenshots / Demo
If the change includes UI changes, include screenshots or a short gif.

## Notes for reviewers
Any special notes, deployment considerations, or manual steps.
